report.summary: Day 57 standup v12 (~12:05 CET): Full rotation 6/6 completed since v11. KEY DELTA — Dkt9eF3dQ deploy now READY (was 'initializing' in v11); BTC LST guide promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES (401 slugs in file); Aerodrome Finance guide built (3,200 words, veAERO Yield Estimator, 68% Base DEX share) → back in PUBLISH_QUEUE (1 item); 18 OG images + 4-page UX audit by design-v9; community-v10 pivoted from FOMC priming to post-FOMC rotation narrative + 3 new RWA/DeFi guide launches; git index.lock now ~25h stale, 401 pages uncommitted, FOMC decision TOMORROW 14:00 ET. 54 agent reports today.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since v11 Standup (11:12 CET)
items: PRODUCTION DEPLOY CONFIRMED READY ✅ — Dkt9eF3dQ status changed from 'initializing' (v11) to 'Ready / Current' (eod-v9). Build time 4m 15s. This is the biggest positive delta this cycle — deploy is live, serving pages, FOMC traffic-ready.

PUBLISHED_PAGES: 401 slugs in file (+1 since v11). BTC LST guide (/learn/bitcoin-liquid-staking-tokens-guide-2026) promoted by publish-v5 from PUBLISH_QUEUE. Queue cleared to 0, then refilled to 1 by build-v9 (Aerodrome Finance guide). Net PUBLISH_QUEUE: 1 item.

New content this cycle (build-v9): /learn/aerodrome-finance-guide — 878-line, 3,200-word intermediate guide on Base's #1 DEX (68% market share, ~$500M TVL, $810M daily volume). Covers ve(3,3) flywheel, veAERO voting, 3 pool types (Stable / Volatile / Slipstream), tokenomics, Q2 2026 Velodrome merge roadmap. Includes interactive AerodromeVeCalculator.tsx (4-year lock estimator). Full SEO: 53-char title, 147-char meta, 6-item FAQ schema, ArticleSchema. Added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

Design-v9 shipped 18 OG images (8 crypto-cards compare + 10 crypto-cards review, all 1200x630 SVG) and 4-page UX audit: airdrops CountdownTimer timer bug fixed (useMemo → useEffect, aria-live added); cashback calculator accessibility improvements (aria-labels, font size fix text-[10px] → text-xs); breadcrumb added to /airdrops; breadcrumbs corrected on /compare/exchanges/bybit-vs-binance and /compare/exchanges/gate-io-vs-kucoin (removed self-referencing hrefs on active pages).

Community-v10 pivoted narrative: FOMC Eve T-1 dot plot primer tweet → post-FOMC April catalyst rotation (Pectra Apr 10, Tax Apr 15, Powell exit May 6) → RWA mega-thread (tokenized stocks + treasuries) → Uniswap V4 Hooks launch → 400-page milestone tweet; post-FOMC newsletter draft ready for Mar 26 dispatch; dual-panel social card (social-post-fomc-rwa-2026.svg) created and saved to /public/.

Market context: BTC holding $75K+ (6-week high, +25% from Feb $60K bottom). Fear & Greed ~35 (recovering from ATL of 5). ETF inflow streak Day 6 ($962.8M since Mar 9). FOMC meeting underway — decision TOMORROW Mar 18 at 2pm ET. Pectra T-24 (Apr 10). Tax deadline T-29 (Apr 15).

Page coverage: 297 page.tsx files for 401 slugs (74% coverage). 104 backlog stubs still pending scaffold. All 6 API routes confirmed healthy. 15+ consecutive successful Vercel builds today, zero failures.
GSC organic window: Day 18 of 21 indexing window — first measurable organic clicks from Jan/Feb content batches expected this week. No GSC data to confirm yet but arrival is imminent.

sections.title: Project Manager — Done vs Carry-Over Since v11
items: FULL ROTATION COMPLETED (6/6) since v11 ✅ — publish-v5 + build-v9 + design-v9 + community-v10 + eod-v9 all ran. Today total: 54 agent reports. v12 standup is report #55.

SHIPPED this cycle ✅ — BTC LST guide live in published-pages.ts (401 slugs); Aerodrome Finance guide scaffolded (3,200 words + yield estimator); 18 OG images for crypto-cards pages; 4 UX/accessibility fixes (airdrops timer, breadcrumbs on 3 pages, accessibility on cashback calc); FOMC Eve → post-FOMC social campaign ready; production deploy Dkt9eF3dQ confirmed READY.

BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] git index.lock + HEAD.lock — NOW ~25 HOURS STALE (created Mar 16 ~11:17/13:06 CET). 401 slugs, 297 page.tsx files, 18 OG images, all design fixes — ALL uncommitted. The Dkt9eF3dQ deploy is a manual redeploy of stale HEAD, not a commit push. FOMC is tomorrow 14:00 ET. Unblocking command: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → git add -A → git commit → git push → Vercel auto-deploys fresh commit.

BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] Rate Limiter 0/6 routes — eod-v9 confirms no checkRateLimit() calls in any public API route. FOMC decision tomorrow will spike /api/prices and /api/trending simultaneously. Still 0/6 coverage, 21st consecutive standup flagging. A single build cycle can patch all 6 routes.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] Aerodrome Finance guide in PUBLISH_QUEUE — awaiting design polish review then promotion to PUBLISHED_PAGES. Next publish cycle should handle this.

CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] API fallback coverage: 2/6 routes have hardcoded fallback data (prices, market-dominance). Four routes (trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, defi-yields) will return HTTP 500 on upstream failure — particularly risky during FOMC traffic spike.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] structured-data.examples.ts → .tsx rename — fixes 40/42 TS errors, non-blocking (ignoreBuildErrors: true), but should be resolved this sprint.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] ~104 slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES without page.tsx — backlog stubs needing scaffold.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P2] Vercel Pro trial: ~7 days remaining (updated from ~8 in v11). Payment method required at vercel.com/account/billing before March 25 to prevent production interruption.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — JEFE ACTION REQUIRED NOW: Remove git locks (2-minute task — the most important thing in the sprint). Commands: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → git add -A → git commit -m 'Day 57: 401 pages, Aerodrome guide, OG images, UX fixes' → git push. This triggers a fresh Vercel deploy from HEAD (401 pages, Aerodrome guide, all design fixes, all structured-data corrections). FOMC decision is TOMORROW at 2pm ET. Without this, the production site serves from a 25-hour-old stale HEAD. Every hour of continued delay compounds risk on the highest-traffic macro event in 6 weeks.

PRIORITY 2 — Wire rate limiters before FOMC (next build cycle, ~30 min): Apply checkRateLimit() to all 6 public API routes, prioritizing /api/prices and /api/trending. Also add fallback data to the 4 routes missing it (trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, defi-yields). FOMC will generate a concurrent traffic spike across all 6 routes — unprotected endpoints are a production risk. After git unlock, this is a single focused build cycle.

PRIORITY 3 — Promote Aerodrome guide + verify live deploy: After git unlock and push, confirm production shows 401 pages including the Aerodrome Finance guide. Promote /learn/aerodrome-finance-guide from PUBLISH_QUEUE to PUBLISHED_PAGES in the next publish cycle. Separately: Jefe verifies Vercel billing at vercel.com/account/billing — trial is now ~7 days, not 8. The window to add payment without risk is this week.

STRATEGIC NOTE — The platform is in its best shape to date: 401 pages, full OG image coverage on crypto-cards, FOMC guide live, Aerodrome guide built, RWA vertical launched (tokenized stocks + treasuries), Uniswap V4 guide ready. The content and social machine has been running cleanly for 12 hours. The sole unresolved bottleneck is a 2-minute terminal action. FOMC tomorrow is a high-traffic catalyst with 6 weeks of BTC momentum behind it — the site needs to be on a clean fresh deploy for that traffic, not a manual redeploy of a 25-hour-old HEAD.
